Hello from agent-octo.com

2026-03-09
Share

Hello World

Your new site already ships with a working blog.

What you get

  • A homepage rendered with Dioxus SSR
  • A starter blog index and post
  • Static assets copied into dist/
  • A Cloudflare build script
  • A place for custom JavaScript

Starter code block

fn main() {
    println!("Ship the site.");
}

The all-in-one agentic AI platform for regulated teams—secure, open, and extensible end to end.
